emails.subject: Re: When are you coming?
emails.body: Re: When are you coming? I don't get there until the night of May 7, so I guess no La Dolce Vita party for me. Thanks for thinking of me though. Have you got your rulers all sharpened up? Enron North America Corp. From: Tana Jones 04/26/2000 08:19 AM

emails.subject: Re: When are you coming?
emails.body: Re: When are you coming? I don't get there until the night of May 7, so I guess no La Dolce Vita party for me. Thanks for thinking of me though. Have you got your rulers all sharpened up? Enron North America Corp. From: Tana Jones 04/26/2000 08:19 AM

emails.subject: When are you coming?
emails.body: When are you coming? I forget when you are coming? If you're in Houston on May 6, Jim Easter in the Asia/Pacific Group will be having his XVIII Annual La Dolce Vita Party which is always a great blast, and I'll secure you an invite too...let me know...!

emails.subject: When are you coming?
